brief.goal: Learner self-study inflation workshop: CPI, GDP deflator, household scenarios, and policy communication for first-year economics.

delivery_notes.consolidation_requirement: The final activity includes a consolidation summary requiring the learner to write at least 80 words summarizing three key ideas and reflecting on their personal context.
